name: Download and Process a File from Google Drive
description: Downloads a file from Google Drive by file ID, analyzes its content with Claude AI, and posts a structured summary to Slack. Useful for automated document review workflows.

source.originalName: Download a file from Google Drive

fileId.description: Google Drive file ID to download

slackChannel.description: Slack channel for file summary notification

steps.name: Extract file metadata and content info
Build Claude prompt for file analysis

code.source:
const info = $.steps.extractFileInfo.output;
const prompt = 'You are a document analysis specialist. Analyze this file and provide a structured summary.

FILE INFO:
Name: ' + info.name + '
Type: ' + info.mimeType + '
Size: ' + info.size + ' bytes
Last Modified: ' + info.modifiedTime + '

CONTENT PREVIEW:
' + info.contentPreview + '

Return ONLY valid JSON:
{
  "fileType": "document type",
  "summary": "2-3 sentence summary of file contents",
  "keyPoints": ["point 1", "point 2"],
  "topics": ["topic1", "topic2"],
  "actionItems": ["any action items found"],
  "wordCount": 0,
  "language": "detected language"
}';
return { prompt };

steps.name: Parse Claude output and strip fences
Build Slack notification with file summary
